title: Waitress / Waiter CV Example UK — Hospitality & Restaurants

cv.name: Luca Romano
cv.title: Waiter
cv.summary: Experienced waiter with 3 years in busy city-centre restaurants serving 100+ covers per shift. Strong upselling, allergen awareness, and team coordination on busy Friday and Saturday services.

bullets: Served 80–120 covers per shift with consistently positive TripAdvisor mentions
Increased dessert upsell rate by 15% through menu knowledge training
Supported allergen queries accurately under Natasha's Law requirements
Managed reservations and guest seating for 60-seat restaurant
Processed payments and split bills accurately on busy weekend services

education.raw:
Food Hygiene Level 2 — 2021
Allergen Awareness Certificate — 2022
